case_title: MARCO ANTONIO et al VS. PAUL CHENEVERT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment;
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. COLLEEN RYAN, TEL. NO. 703-4877 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is Granted, no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/PJB)

Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFFs MARCO ANTONIO and GONZALEZ JIMENEZ's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. (301/PJB)
